title: Bāghpat Heat Wave
lead: Bāghpat is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +7.11. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bāghpat are extremely hot and dry, with a relative humidity of 19%. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 23.9 GG, indicating a significant energy demand for cooling. 
 The wind speed of 13.7 km/h is not sufficient to provide any relief from the heat, making the situation even more critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
